config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama agar kepentingan masyarakat tidak berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau minoritas. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai lewat aturan yang adil, bukan dengan mengorbankan kebebasan dasar seseorang. Dari pengalaman melihat realitas sosial, saya lebih percaya pada keseimbangan yang melindungi individu sekaligus menjaga ketertiban umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society’s interests should not automatically outrank the rights of the individual; I see that as a dangerous principle if it is stated too broadly. From my perspective in China, social stability and collective responsibility are important, and I understand why people emphasize the common good, but I also think individual rights need real protection because otherwise “society” can become an excuse for arbitrary pressure on ordinary people. The best approach is not to choose one side absolutely, but to set clear limits so the public interest can be pursued without sacrificing basic dignity and fairness.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju kalau kepentingan masyarakat ditempatkan di atas hak individu secara umum. Di Indonesia, saya melihat alasan “demi kepentingan bersama” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan, padahal justru orang kecil yang paling sering menanggung akibatnya. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dijalankan lewat hukum yang adil dan proporsional, bukan dengan mengorbankan hak dasar seperti kebebasan, martabat, dan perlindungan dari perlakuan sewenang-wenang. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang mampu menjaga keseimbangan tanpa menindas yang lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as written, because putting society’s interests above individual rights too easily becomes a blank check for abuse. From my perspective in China, I understand the appeal of collective goals, social order, and long-term stability, but I have also seen how quickly “for the greater good” can silence ordinary people if there are no firm limits. Individual rights should not be treated as obstacles to society; they are the guardrails that keep public power fair and prevent the vulnerable from being sacrificed.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena di Indonesia alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi kalau hak individu tidak dijaga sebagai batas, yang paling mudah dikorbankan justru orang kecil dan kelompok yang tidak punya kuasa. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang menyeimbangkan ketertiban dengan perlindungan martabat, kebebasan, dan keadilan. Jadi, prioritas utama seharusnya bukan masyarakat di atas individu, melainkan aturan yang adil agar keduanya bisa berjalan tanpa penindasan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the claim that society should take priority over the individual as a general rule. From my perspective in China, I understand why people value collective stability and long-term development, but I also know that once “society” is treated as automatically more important, it can be used to justify silencing ordinary people and ignoring basic fairness. Individual rights are not selfish extras; they are the limits that keep public power accountable and protect people who are easiest to sacrifice. The right balance is not society versus the individual, but a society strong enough to serve everyone without crushing anyone.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
